title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the project's README file to include an author section as per standard open source conventions.
details: Open the README.md file at the root of the project. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical place if a contributors/credits section exists). Include the author's name and, if appropriate, contact information or a link to a profile (e.g., GitHub, email). Ensure formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to Markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Visually inspect the README.md file to confirm the author section is present, correctly formatted, and contains accurate information. Optionally, preview the README in a Markdown viewer to verify appearance.
